TURSO_URL.description: Required Turso/libSQL HTTP URL used by GPROXY edge persistence, for example https://your-db.turso.io. Do not use libsql:// on edge.

TURSO_TOKEN.description: Required Turso database token with access to the TURSO_URL database. It is stored as a Worker secret.

GPROXY_ADMIN_USER.description: Required admin username for the first Console login, for example admin.

GPROXY_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Required non-blank admin password for the first Console login. It is stored as a Worker secret.
